item.name: marketplace - Share request via link modal

loader.HTML:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <meta name="myop:size" content='{"width":"100%","height":"100%"}'>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;0,600;0,700;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <script type="myop/types">
        // =============================================================================
        // MYOP COMPONENT TYPE DEFINITIONS
        // =============================================================================

        /**
         * Data structure passed to myop_init_interface(data)
         */
        interface MyopInitData {
            /** The title shown in the modal header */
            title: string;
            /** Subtitle/description text below the title */
            subtitle?: string;
            /** List of components to choose from in the dropdown */
            components: Array<{ id: string; name: string }>;
            /** Optional pre-selected component id */
            selectedComponentId?: string;
            /** If true, the component dropdown is locked and cannot be changed */
            disableComponentSelect?: boolean;
            /** Optional pre-filled description */
            description?: string;
            /** Optional pre-filled contact email */
            contactEmail?: string;
            /** Optional pre-filled deadline date (DD/MM/YYYY) */
            deadline?: string;
            /** Icon URL or gradient placeholder */
            iconUrl?: string;
            /** Submit / Save button label */
            submitLabel?: string;
        }

        /**
         * Actions and payloads for myop_cta_handler(action, payload)
         */
        interface MyopCtaPayloads {
            /** User clicked "+ Add Component" in the dropdown */
            'add-component-clicked': void;
            /** User clicked the Close Request / Reopen Request toggle */
            'close-request-clicked': void;
            /** User clicked the Copy Link button */
            'copy-link-clicked': void;
            /** User closed the modal */
            'modal-closed': void;
            /** User submitted the form */
            'submit-clicked': {
                componentId: string;
                description: string;
                contactEmail: string;
                deadline: string;
            };
        }

        // =============================================================================
        // DO NOT EDIT BELOW - Standard Myop type declarations
        // =============================================================================

        declare function myop_init_interface(): MyopInitData;
        declare function myop_init_interface(data: MyopInitData): void;

        declare function myop_cta_handler<K extends keyof MyopCtaPayloads>(
            action: K,
            payload: MyopCtaPayloads[K]
        ): void;
    </script>
    <style>
        * {
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        html, body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            overflow: hidden;
            font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif;
            background: transparent;
        }

        body {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        #app-root {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .modal {
            border-radius: 12px;
            border: none;
            background: var(--White, #FFF);
            box-shadow: none;
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 780px;
            height: 100%;
            position: relative;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            overflow: hidden;
            z-index: 0;
        }

        .modal-scroll-area {
            overflow-y: auto;
            padding: 24px 32px 24px 32px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            flex: 1;
            min-height: 0;
        }

        .modal-scroll-area > * + * {
            margin-top: 24px;
        }

        .modal-footer {
            margin-top: 24px !important;
            margin-bottom: 0 !important;
        }

        .modal::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 8px }
        .modal::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent }
        .modal::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #D9D9D9; border-radius: 80px }
        .modal::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: #C0C0C0 }

        .close-btn {
            position: absolute;
            top: 20px;
            right: 20px;
            width: 32px;
            height: 32px;
            border: none;
            background: transparent;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            border-radius: 6px;
            padding: 0;
            color: #6B7280;
            transition: background 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease;
        }

        .close-btn:hover {
            background: #F3F4F6;
            color: #1F2937;
        }

        .close-btn svg {
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
        }

        .modal-header {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 8px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .modal-body {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 24px;
        }

        .modal-header .modal-icon {
            margin-bottom: 12px;
        }

        .modal-icon {
            width: 100px;
            height: 101px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .modal-icon svg {
            width: 100px;
            height: 101px;
            display: block;
        }

        .modal-icon img {
            width: 82px;
            height: 82px;
            object-fit: cover;
            border-radius: 12px;
        }

        .modal-title {
            font-family: "DM Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
            font-size: 24px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 500;
            line-height: 32px;
            color: #3E3D3E;
            margin: 0;
        }

        .modal-subtitle {
            font-family: "DM Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 24px;
            color: #3E3D3E;
            margin: 0;
        }

        .form-group {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 8px;
        }

        .form-row {
            display: flex;
            gap: 16px;
        }

        .form-row .form-group {
            flex: 1;
        }

        .form-label {
            font-family: "DM Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
            font-size: 11px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 600;
            line-height: 14px;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #6A696A;
        }

        /* Rich textarea container */
        .rich-textarea-container {
            position: relative;
            width: 100%;
            border: 1px solid #e5e4e4;
            border-radius: 8px;
            padding: 8px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            min-height: 120px;
            background: #ffffff;
            transition: border-color 0.15s ease;
        }

        .rich-textarea-container:focus-within {
            border-color: #D3D1D5;
        }

        .rich-editable {
            border: none;
            outline: none;
            resize: none;
            font-family: "DM Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 300;
            line-height: 18px;
            color: #3E3D3E;
            width: 100%;
            min-height: 90px;
            max-height: 150px;
            flex: 1;
            overflow-y: auto;
            overflow-x: hidden;
            white-space: pre-wrap;
            word-wrap: break-word;
            overflow-wrap: break-word;
            scrollbar-width: thin;
            scrollbar-color: rgba(0,0,0,0.15) transparent;
        }

        .rich-editable:empty::before {
            content: attr(data-placeholder);
            color: #9ca3af;
            opacity: 0.8;
            pointer-events: none;
            font-style: italic;
            font-weight: 400;
        }

        .rich-editable::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 4px; }
        .rich-editable::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; }
        .rich-editable::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.15); border-radius: 4px; }

        .rich-editable a {
            color: var(--Purple-100, #6C18FF);
            text-decoration: none;
        }
        .rich-editable a:hover {
            color: var(--Purple---Dark, #4200B6);
            text-decoration: none;
        }

        .hidden-color-picker {
            position: absolute;
            opacity: 0;
            width: 0;
            height: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        /* Inline color swatch token */
        .color-swatch-token {
            display: inline-block;
            width: 12px;
            height: 12px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
            vertical-align: middle;
            margin-right: 3px;
            cursor: pointer;
            user-select: none;
            transition: transform 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease;
        }

        .color-swatch-token:hover {
            transform: scale(1.2);
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }

        /* Animated color keyword token */
        @keyframes gradient-shift {
            0%   { background-position: 0% 50%; }
            50%  { background-position: 100% 50%; }
            100% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
        }

        .color-keyword-token {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b, #feca57, #48dbfb, #ff9ff3, #54a0ff);
            background-size: 300% 300%;
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            animation: gradient-shift 3s ease infinite;
            border-bottom: 1px dashed rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.5);
            padding-bottom: 1px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        .color-keyword-token:hover {
            animation-duration: 0.5s;
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .rich-textarea-container {
                max-width: 500px;
                width: 100%;
                min-height: 160px;
            }
        }

        /* Custom dropdown */
        .custom-dropdown {
            position: relative;
        }

        .dropdown-trigger {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            border: 1px solid #D3D1D5;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-family: "DM Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-style: italic;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 18px;
            color: #71717a;
            background: #ffffff;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: border-color 0.15s ease;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            text-align: left;
        }

        .dropdown-trigger span {
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }

        .dropdown-trigger.has-value {
            color: #3E3D3E;
            font-style: normal;
        }

        .dropdown-trigger svg {
            width: 12px;
            height: 8px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            transition: transform 0.2s ease;
        }

        .dropdown-trigger.locked {
            cursor: default;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .dropdown-trigger.locked svg {
            display: none;
        }

        .custom-dropdown.open .dropdown-trigger svg {
            transform: rotate(180deg);
        }

        .dropdown-panel {
            display: none;
            position: absolute;
            top: calc(100% + 4px);
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            background: #ffffff;
            border: 1px solid #E5E7EB;
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
            z-index: 102;
            flex-direction: column;
            max-height: 312px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .custom-dropdown.open .dropdown-panel {
            display: flex;
        }

        .dropdown-search {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #E5E7EB;
        }

        .dropdown-search svg {
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
            color: #6A696A;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .dropdown-search input {
            border: none;
            outline: none;
            font-family: "DM Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-style: italic;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 18px;
            color: #3E3D3E;
            width: 100%;
            background: transparent;
        }

        .dropdown-search input::placeholder {
            color: #71717a;
            font-style: italic;
        }

        .dropdown-list {
            overflow-y: auto;
            flex: 1;
            min-height: 0;
            padding: 4px 8px;
        }

        .dropdown-item {
            padding: 12px 12px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-family: "DM Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 20px;
            color: #3E3D3E;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background 0.1s ease;
        }

        .dropdown-item:hover {
            background: #F0E8FF;
        }

        .dropdown-item.selected {
            background: #DECCFF;
        }

        .dropdown-item.hidden {
            display: none;
        }

        .dropdown-add {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 6px;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            border-top: 1px solid #E5E7EB;
            font-family: "DM Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 18px;
            color: #0A090A;
            cursor: pointer;
            background: #ffffff;
            transition: color 0.1s ease;
        }

        .dropdown-add:hover {
            color: #9747FF;
        }

        .dropdown-empty {
            display: none;
            height: 200px;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: 40px 20px;
            text-align: center;
            font-family: "DM Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 24px;
            color: #6A696A;
        }

        .dropdown-add svg {
            width: 8.75px;
            height: 8.75px;
        }

        .form-input {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px;
            border: 1px solid #D3D1D5;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-family: "DM Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 18px;
            color: #3E3D3E;
            background: #ffffff;
            transition: border-color 0.15s ease;
        }

        .form-input::placeholder {
            color: #71717a;
            font-style: italic;
            font-weight: 400;
        }

        .form-input:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: #E5E7EB;
        }

        /* Date picker styles */
        .date-picker-wrapper {
            position: relative;
        }

        .date-picker-input {
            cursor: pointer;
            padding-right: 36px;
        }

        .date-clear-btn {
            display: none;
            position: absolute;
            right: 10px;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 0;
            color: #C4C3C5;
            transition: color 0.15s ease;
            z-index: 10;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .date-clear-btn:hover {
            color: #6A696A;
        }

        .date-clear-btn svg {
            width: 9px;
            height: 9px;
        }

        .date-clear-btn.visible {
            display: flex;
        }

        .calendar-panel {
            display: none;
            position: absolute;
            bottom: calc(100% + 4px);
            left: 0;
            background: #ffffff;
            border: 1px solid #E5E7EB;
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
            z-index: 200;
            padding: 16px;
            min-width: 300px;
        }

        .calendar-panel.open {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 12px;
        }

        .calendar-header {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }

        .calendar-header button {
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 6px 10px;
            color: #3E3D3E;
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: bold;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.15s ease;
        }

        .calendar-header button:hover {
            background: transparent;
            color: #9747FF;
        }

        .calendar-month-year {
            font-family: "DM Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: #3E3D3E;
            text-align: center;
            flex: 1;
        }

        .calendar-weekdays {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
            gap: 6px;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }

        .calendar-weekday {
            font-family: "DM Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
            font-size: 12px;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: #6A696A;
            text-align: center;
            padding: 6px 0;
        }

        .calendar-days {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
            gap: 6px;
        }

        .calendar-day {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            width: 100%;
            aspect-ratio: 1;
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-family: "DM Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 500;
            color: #3E3D3E;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.15s ease;
            border: 2px solid transparent;
            background: transparent;
        }

        .calendar-day:hover:not(.other-month):not(.selected) {
            background: #DECCFF;
        }

        .calendar-day.other-month {
            color: #D3D1D5;
            cursor: default;
        }

        .calendar-day.selected {
            background: #F0E8FF;
            color: #3E3D3E;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .calendar-day.today:not(.selected) {
            border: 1.5px solid #9747FF;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        /* Form row wrapper for closed tag */
        .form-row-wrapper {
            position: relative;
            margin-bottom: 0;
        }

        /* Closed tag */
        .closed-tag {
            display: none;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            pointer-events: none;
            position: absolute;
            top: 100%;
            left: 0;
            margin-top: 20px;
        }

        .closed-tag.visible {
            display: flex;
        }

        .closed-badge {
            display: flex;
            height: 18px;
            padding: 1px 8px;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            border: 1px solid var(--Grey-20, #D3D1D5);
            background: var(--Red-5, #FFECE4);
            font-family: "DM Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
            font-size: 12px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 24px;
            color: var(--Black, #0A090A);
            text-align: right;
        }

        .closed-message {
            font-family: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
            font-size: 11px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 14px;
            color: var(--Grey-90, #3E3D3E);
        }

        /* Modal footer */
        .modal-footer {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: flex-end;
            gap: 8px;
            font-size: 13px;
        }

        /* Submit button */
        .submit-btn {
            padding: 6px 12px;
            height: 34px;
            background: var(--Grey-90, #3E3D3E);
            color: #FFFFFF;
            border: 1px solid transparent;
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-family: "DM Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
            font-size: 13px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 300;
            line-height: 24px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease;
        }

        .submit-btn:hover {
            background: #9747FF;
        }

        .submit-btn:disabled {
            border-radius: 6px;
            background: var(--Grey-10, #E5E4E4);
            color: var(--Grey-40, #B6B5B7);
            cursor: not-allowed;
            pointer-events: none;
            opacity: 1;
        }

        /* Save button */
        .save-btn {
            padding: 6px 12px;
            height: 34px;
            background: var(--Grey-90, #3E3D3E);
            color: #FFFFFF;
            border: 1px solid transparent;
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-family: "DM Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
            font-size: 13px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 24px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease;
        }

        .save-btn:hover { background: #9747FF; }

        .save-btn.disabled {
            border-radius: 6px;
            background: var(--Grey-10, #E5E4E4);
            color: var(--Grey-40, #B6B5B7);
            cursor: not-allowed;
            pointer-events: none;
            opacity: 1;
        }

        .save-btn:not(.disabled):not(.clicked) {
            pointer-events: auto;
            cursor: pointer;
        }


        /* Copy link button */
        .copy-link-btn {
            padding: 6px 12px;
            height: 34px;
            background: transparent;
            color: var(--Black, #0A090A);
            border: 1px solid #D3D1D5;
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-family: "DM Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
            font-size: 13px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 24px;
            text-align: right;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
        }

        .copy-link-btn svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; }
        .copy-link-btn svg path { stroke: currentColor; }

        .copy-link-btn:hover {
            border-radius: 6px;
            border: 1px solid var(--Purple-10, #DECCFF);
            background: var(--Purple-5, #F0E8FF);
        }

        .copy-link-btn.clicked {
            border-radius: 6px;
            border-color: #D3D1D5;
            background: #DCFF89;
            color: #0A090A;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .copy-link-btn.disabled {
            color: #B6B5B7;
            border: 1px solid var(--Grey-20, #D3D1D5);
            cursor: not-allowed;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .copy-link-btn.disabled svg { color: #B6B5B7; }

        /* Close request button */
        .close-request-btn {
            padding: 6px 12px;
            height: 34px;
            background: transparent;
            color: var(--Black, #0A090A);
            border: 1px solid #D3D1D5;
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-family: "DM Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
            font-size: 13px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 24px;
            text-align: right;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease;
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            justify-content: center;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }

        .close-request-btn svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; }

        .close-request-btn:hover {
            border-radius: 6px;
            border: 1px solid var(--Purple-10, #DECCFF);
            background: var(--Purple-5, #F0E8FF);
        }

        .close-request-btn.hidden { display: none; }

        /* Hidden utility */
        .hidden { display: none !important; }

        @media (max-width: 640px) {
            .modal { padding: 20px 20px 10px 20px; }
            .form-row { flex-direction: column; gap: 24px; }
            .modal-footer { gap: 8px; justify-content: flex-start; margin-top: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
            .submit-btn, .save-btn {
                flex: 0 1 100%;
                width: 100%;
                justify-content: center;
                text-align: center !important;
                font-size: 14px;
                padding: 8px 12px;
                order: -2;
            }
            .modal-footer .copy-link-btn {
                flex: 0 1 calc(50% - 4px) !important;
                width: calc(50% - 4px) !important;
                min-width: 0 !important;
                max-width: calc(50% - 4px) !important;
                justify-content: center;
                font-size: 14px;
                padding: 8px 12px;
                order: -1;
            }
            .modal-footer .close-request-btn {
                flex: 0 1 calc(50% - 4px) !important;
                width: calc(50% - 4px) !important;
                min-width: 0 !important;
                max-width: calc(50% - 4px) !important;
                justify-content: center;
                font-size: 14px;
                padding: 8px 12px;
                order: -1;
            }
        }

        @media (max-width: 400px) {
            .submit-btn, .save-btn, .copy-link-btn, .close-request-btn {
                flex: 0 1 100% !important;
                width: 100% !important;
                order: auto;
            }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
<div id="app-root"></div>

<script>
    (function() {
        var currentData = null;

        // SVG icons
        var SVG_COPY_LINK = '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none"><path d="M7.23768 5.24023C6.88568 5.40823 6.55568 5.63823 6.26468 5.93023L6.25468 5.94023C4.87368 7.32123 4.87368 9.55923 6.25468 10.9402L8.42968 13.1152C9.81068 14.4962 12.0487 14.4962 13.4297 13.1152L13.4397 13.1052C14.8207 11.7242 14.8207 9.48623 13.4397 8.10523L12.5087 7.17423" stroke="#0A090A" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M8.23769 9.58653C8.58969 9.41853 8.91969 9.18853 9.21069 8.89653L9.22069 8.88653C10.6017 7.50553 10.6017 5.26753 9.22069 3.88653L7.04569 1.71153C5.66469 0.330531 3.42669 0.330531 2.04569 1.71153L2.03569 1.72153C0.654689 3.10253 0.654689 5.34053 2.03569 6.72153L2.96669 7.65253" stroke="#0A090A" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>';

        var SVG_CLOSE_REQUEST = '<svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><g clip-path="url(#clip0_1256_18840)"><path d="M2 6C2 4.34315 3.34315 3 5 3H11C12.6569 3 14 4.34315 14 6V11C14 12.6569 12.6569 14 11 14H5C3.34315 14 2 12.6569 2 11V6Z" stroke="currentColor"/><path d="M2 5.5C2 4.11929 3.11929 3 4.5 3H11.5C12.8807 3 14 4.11929 14 5.5C14 6.88071 12.8807 8 11.5 8H4.5C3.11929 8 2 6.88071 2 5.5Z" stroke="currentColor"/><path d="M6 3C6 1.89543 6.89543 1 8 1C9.10457 1 10 1.89543 10 3" stroke="currentColor"/></g><line x1="1" y1="15.2929" x2="15.2929" y2="1" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round"/><defs><clipPath id="clip0_1256_18840"><rect width="16" height="16" fill="white"/></clipPath></defs></svg>';

        var SVG_REOPEN_REQUEST = '<svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M2 6C2 4.34315 3.34315 3 5 3H11C12.6569 3 14 4.34315 14 6V11C14 12.6569 12.6569 14 11 14H5C3.34315 14 2 12.6569 2 11V6Z" stroke="currentColor"/><path d="M2 5.5C2 4.11929 3.11929 3 4.5 3H11.5C12.8807 3 14 4.11929 14 5.5C14 6.88071 12.8807 8 11.5 8H4.5C3.11929 8 2 6.88071 2 5.5Z" stroke="currentColor"/><path d="M6 3C6 1.89543 6.89543 1 8 1C9.10457 1 10 1.89543 10 3" stroke="currentColor"/></svg>';

        var COLOR_REGEX = /(#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}\b|rgba?\s*\(\s*\d+\s*,\s*\d+\s*,\s*\d+\s*(?:,\s*[\d.]+\s*)?\))/gi;
        var URL_REGEX = /https?:\/\/[^\s<>"']+/gi;

        function renderColorTokens(text) {
            var escaped = escapeHTML(text);
            // Replace newlines with <br>
            escaped = escaped.replace(/\n/g, '<br>');
            // Linkify URLs first (split on <br> to avoid matching across lines)
            escaped = escaped.replace(URL_REGEX, function(url) {
                return '<a href="' + url + '" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">' + url + '</a>';
            });
            // Apply color tokens only outside of <a> tags
            escaped = escaped.replace(/(<a [^>]+>.*?<\/a>)|((#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}\b|rgba?\s*\(\s*\d+\s*,\s*\d+\s*,\s*\d+\s*(?:,\s*[\d.]+\s*)?\)))/gi, function(match, link, full, color) {
                if (link) return link; // preserve <a> tags untouched
                return '<span class="color-swatch-token" contenteditable="false" data-color="' + color + '" style="background:' + color + '"></span>' +
                       '<span class="color-keyword-token" data-color="' + color + '">' + color + '</span>';
            });
            return escaped;
        }

        function getPlainText(el) {
            // Walk DOM, skip swatch nodes, convert <br> and block elements to \n, collect text
            var result = '';
            function walk(node) {
                if (node.nodeType === 3) {
                    result += node.nodeValue;
                } else if (node.nodeName === 'BR') {
                    result += '\n';
                } else if (node.classList && node.classList.contains('color-swatch-token')) {
                    // skip — swatch is decorative
                } else {
                    // Block elements (div, p) act as line breaks
                    var isBlock = (node.nodeName === 'DIV' || node.nodeName === 'P') && node !== el;
                    if (isBlock && result.length > 0 && result[result.length - 1] !== '\n') {
                        result += '\n';
                    }
                    for (var i = 0; i < node.childNodes.length; i++) walk(node.childNodes[i]);
                }
            }
            walk(el);
            return result;
        }

        function getCaretOffset(el) {
            var sel = window.getSelection();
            if (!sel || sel.rangeCount === 0) return 0;
            var range = sel.getRangeAt(0);
            var preCaretRange = document.createRange();
            preCaretRange.selectNodeContents(el);
            preCaretRange.setEnd(range.endContainer, range.endOffset);
            var fragment = preCaretRange.cloneContents();
            var temp = document.createElement('div');
            temp.appendChild(fragment);
            return getPlainText(temp).length;
        }

        function restoreCaretOffset(el, targetOffset) {
            var sel = window.getSelection();
            var charCount = 0;
            var lastTextNode = null;
            var lastTextEnd = 0;
            function setCaret(node, offset) {
                var r = document.createRange();
                r.setStart(node, offset);
                r.collapse(true);
                sel.removeAllRanges();
                sel.addRange(r);
            }
            function walk(node) {
                if (node.nodeType === 3) {
                    var end = charCount + node.length;
                    lastTextNode = node;
                    lastTextEnd = node.length;
                    if (targetOffset <= end) {
                        var pos = targetOffset - charCount;
                        // Avoid placing caret at start of text inside <a> — place before the <a> instead
                        if (pos === 0 && node.parentNode && node.parentNode.nodeName === 'A') {
                            var link = node.parentNode;
                            var parent = link.parentNode;
                            var idx = Array.prototype.indexOf.call(parent.childNodes, link);
                            setCaret(parent, idx);
                            return true;
                        }
                        setCaret(node, pos);
                        return true;
                    }
                    charCount = end;
                } else if (node.nodeName === 'BR') {
                    if (charCount === targetOffset) {
                        var parent = node.parentNode;
                        var idx = Array.prototype.indexOf.call(parent.childNodes, node);
                        setCaret(parent, idx);
                        return true;
                    }
                    charCount += 1;
                } else if (node.classList && node.classList.contains('color-swatch-token')) {
                    // skip
                } else {
                    for (var i = 0; i < node.childNodes.length; i++) {
                        if (walk(node.childNodes[i])) return true;
                    }
                }
                return false;
            }
            if (!walk(el) && lastTextNode) {
                setCaret(lastTextNode, lastTextEnd);
            }
        }

        function render(data) {
            var container = document.getElementById('app-root');
            var description = data.description || '';
            var contactEmail = data.contactEmail || '';
            var deadline = data.deadline || '';
            var submitLabel = data.submitLabel || 'Save & generate link';
            var subtitle = data.subtitle || '';

            // Editing mode when a custom submitLabel is provided (host overrides the default)
            var isEditingMode = !!(data.submitLabel && data.submitLabel !== 'Save & generate link');

            var defaultIconSVG =
                '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="100" height="101" viewBox="0 0 100 101" fill="none">' +
                '<path d="M1.66431 42.5898C1.66431 35.9624 7.03689 30.5898 13.6643 30.5898H65.0943C71.7218 30.5898 77.0944 35.9624 77.0944 42.5898V88.554C77.0944 95.1814 71.7218 100.554 65.0944 100.554H13.6643C7.03691 100.554 1.66431 95.1814 1.66431 88.554V42.5898Z" fill="url(#paint0_linear_4037_16976)" fill-opacity="0.4"/>' +
                '<path d="M1.66431 42.5898C1.66431 35.9624 7.03689 30.5898 13.6643 30.5898H65.0943C71.7218 30.5898 77.0944 35.9624 77.0944 42.5898V50.2923C77.0944 56.9198 71.7218 62.2923 65.0944 62.2923H13.6643C7.03691 62.2923 1.66431 56.9197 1.66431 50.2923V42.5898Z" fill="url(#paint1_linear_4037_16976)" fill-opacity="0.4"/>' +
                '<path d="M27.6643 30.6855C27.6643 24.6104 32.5892 19.6855 38.6643 19.6855C44.7394 19.6855 49.6643 24.6104 49.6643 30.6855" stroke="url(#paint2_linear_4037_16976)" stroke-width="3"/>' +
                '<path d="M11.9397 34.3145C11.9397 27.687 17.3123 22.3145 23.9397 22.3145H75.3697C81.9971 22.3145 87.3698 27.687 87.3698 34.3145V80.2786C87.3698 86.906 81.9972 92.2786 75.3698 92.2786H23.9397C17.3123 92.2786 11.9397 86.906 11.9397 80.2786V34.3145Z" fill="url(#paint3_linear_4037_16976)" fill-opacity="0.4"/>' +
                '<path d="M11.9397 34.3144C11.9397 27.687 17.3123 22.3145 23.9397 22.3145H75.3697C81.9971 22.3145 87.3698 27.687 87.3698 34.3145V42.017C87.3698 48.6444 81.9972 54.0169 75.3698 54.0169H23.9397C17.3123 54.0169 11.9397 48.6444 11.9397 42.0169V34.3144Z" fill="url(#paint4_linear_4037_16976)" fill-opacity="0.4"/>' +
                '<path d="M23 24.4043C23 17.7769 28.3726 12.4043 35 12.4043H86.43C93.0574 12.4043 98.4301 17.7769 98.4301 24.4043V70.3684C98.4301 76.9958 93.0575 82.3684 86.4301 82.3684H35C28.3726 82.3684 23 76.9958 23 70.3684V24.4043Z" fill="url(#paint5_linear_4037_16976)"/>' +
                '<path d="M23 24.4043C23 17.7769 28.3726 12.4043 35 12.4043H86.43C93.0574 12.4043 98.4301 17.7769 98.4301 24.4043V32.1068C98.4301 38.7342 93.0575 44.1068 86.4301 44.1068H35C28.3726 44.1068 23 38.7342 23 32.1068V24.4043Z" fill="url(#paint6_linear_4037_16976)"/>' +
                '<path d="M49 12.5C49 6.42487 53.9249 1.5 60 1.5C66.0751 1.5 71 6.42487 71 12.5" stroke="url(#paint7_linear_4037_16976)" stroke-width="3"/>' +
                '<defs>' +
                '<linearGradient id="paint0_linear_4037_16976" x1="90.5611" y1="30.5899" x2="19.7418" y2="109.433" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse"><stop offset="0.08" stop-color="#FF8651"/><stop offset="0.504183" stop-color="#FFBEA8"/><stop offset="0.97139" stop-color="#A397F5"/></linearGradient>' +
                '<linearGradient id="paint1_linear_4037_16976" x1="90.5611" y1="30.5899" x2="68.0223" y2="85.9664" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse"><stop offset="0.08" stop-color="#FF8651"/><stop offset="0.504183" stop-color="#FFBEA8"/><stop offset="0.97139" stop-color="#A397F5"/></linearGradient>' +
                '<linearGradient id="paint2_linear_4037_16976" x1="37.6972" y1="30.6855" x2="38.9867" y2="19.8601" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse"><stop offset="0.08" stop-color="#FF8651"/><stop offset="0.504183" stop-color="#FFBEA8"/><stop offset="0.97139" stop-color="#A397F5"/></linearGradient>' +
                '<linearGradient id="paint3_linear_4037_16976" x1="100.836" y1="22.3145" x2="30.0172" y2="101.158" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse"><stop offset="0.08" stop-color="#FF8651"/><stop offset="0.504183" stop-color="#FFBEA8"/><stop offset="0.97139" stop-color="#A397F5"/></linearGradient>' +
                '<linearGradient id="paint4_linear_4037_16976" x1="100.836" y1="22.3145" x2="78.2977" y2="77.691" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse"><stop offset="0.08" stop-color="#FF8651"/><stop offset="0.504183" stop-color="#FFBEA8"/><stop offset="0.97139" stop-color="#A397F5"/></linearGradient>' +
                '<linearGradient id="paint5_linear_4037_16976" x1="111.897" y1="12.4043" x2="41.0775" y2="91.2477" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse"><stop offset="0.08" stop-color="#FF8651"/><stop offset="0.504183" stop-color="#FFBEA8"/><stop offset="0.97139" stop-color="#A397F5"/></linearGradient>' +
                '<linearGradient id="paint6_linear_4037_16976" x1="111.897" y1="12.4043" x2="89.358" y2="67.7808" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse"><stop offset="0.08" stop-color="#FF8651"/><stop offset="0.504183" stop-color="#FFBEA8"/><stop offset="0.97139" stop-color="#A397F5"/></linearGradient>' +
                '<linearGradient id="paint7_linear_4037_16976" x1="59.0329" y1="12.5" x2="60.3224" y2="1.67454" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse"><stop offset="0.08" stop-color="#FF8651"/><stop offset="0.504183" stop-color="#FFBEA8"/><stop offset="0.97139" stop-color="#A397F5"/></linearGradient>' +
                '</defs>' +
                '</svg>';

            var iconHTML = data.iconUrl
                ? '<img src="' + escapeHTML(data.iconUrl) + '" alt="Component icon" />'
                : defaultIconSVG;

            // Build custom dropdown items
            var components = data.components || [];
            var selectedId = data.selectedComponentId || '';
            var selectedName = 'Select';
            var itemsHTML = '';
            for (var i = 0; i < components.length; i++) {
                var comp = components[i];
                var itemClass = 'dropdown-item' + (comp.id === selectedId ? ' selected' : '');
                if (comp.id === selectedId) selectedName = comp.name;
                itemsHTML += '<div class="' + itemClass + '" data-id="' + escapeHTML(comp.id) + '">' + escapeHTML(comp.name) + '</div>';
            }

            var isLocked = !!data.disableComponentSelect || isEditingMode;
            var triggerClass = 'dropdown-trigger' + (selectedId ? ' has-value' : '') + (isLocked ? ' locked' : '');

            // Subtitle HTML
            var subtitleHTML = subtitle
                ? '<p class="modal-subtitle">' + escapeHTML(subtitle) + '</p>'
                : '';

            // Footer buttons HTML
            var footerHTML = '';
            if (isEditingMode) {
                // Editing mode: Close Request | Copy Link | Save
                footerHTML =
                    '<button class="close-request-btn" data-action="close-request">' + SVG_CLOSE_REQUEST + 'Close request</button>' +
                    '<button class="copy-link-btn" data-action="copy-link">' + SVG_COPY_LINK + 'Copy link</button>' +
                    '<button class="save-btn" data-action="save">' + escapeHTML(submitLabel) + '</button>';
            } else {
                // Default: single submit button
                footerHTML = '<button class="submit-btn" data-action="submit"' + (selectedId ? '' : ' disabled') + '>' + escapeHTML(submitLabel) + '</button>';
            }

            container.innerHTML =
                '<div class="modal">' +
                '<div class="modal-scroll-area">' +
                '<div class="modal-header">' +
                '<div class="modal-icon">' + iconHTML + '</div>' +
                '<h2 class="modal-title">' + escapeHTML(data.title) + '</h2>' +
                subtitleHTML +
                '</div>' +
                '<div class="modal-body">' +
                '<div class="form-group">' +
                '<label class="form-label">' + (isEditingMode ? 'Component name' : 'Choose component') + '</label>' +
                '<div class="custom-dropdown" id="component-dropdown">' +
                '<button type="button" class="' + triggerClass + '" id="dropdown-trigger" data-selected-id="' + escapeHTML(selectedId) + '">' +
                '<span>' + escapeHTML(selectedName) + '</span>' +
                '<svg viewBox="0 0 12 8" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M1 1.5L6 6.5L11 1.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>' +
                '</button>' +
                '<div class="dropdown-panel">' +
                '<div class="dropdown-search">' +
                '<svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M7.333 12.667A5.333 5.333 0 1 0 7.333 2a5.333 5.333 0 0 0 0 10.667zM14 14l-2.9-2.9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.33" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>' +
                '<input type="text" id="dropdown-search-input" placeholder="Search" />' +
                '</div>' +
                '<div class="dropdown-list">' + itemsHTML + '</div>' +
                '<div class="dropdown-empty">There are no components here</div>' +
                '<div class="dropdown-add" id="dropdown-add-btn">' +
                '<svg viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M7 1v12M1 7h12" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>' +
                'Add Component' +
                '</div>' +
                '</div>' +
                '</div>' +
                '</div>' +
                '<div class="form-group">' +
                '<label class="form-label" for="description-input">Description</label>' +
                '<div class="rich-textarea-container" id="rich-textarea-container">' +
                '<div class="rich-editable" id="description-input" contenteditable="true" role="textbox" aria-multiline="true" data-placeholder="Describe the component and add relevant links (Figma, demo, docs)...">' + (description ? renderColorTokens(description) : '') + '</div>' +
                '<input type="color" class="hidden-color-picker" id="hidden-color-picker" />' +
                '</div>' +
                '</div>' +
                '<div class="form-row-wrapper">' +
                '<div class="form-row">' +
                '<div class="form-group">' +
                '<label class="form-label" for="email-input">Contact email</label>' +
                '<input class="form-input" type="email" id="email-input" placeholder="Email for updates" value="' + escapeHTML(contactEmail) + '" />' +
                '</div>' +
                '<div class="form-group">' +
                '<label class="form-label" for="deadline-input">Deadline (optional)</label>' +
                '<div class="date-picker-wrapper" id="date-picker-wrapper">' +
                '<input class="form-input date-picker-input" type="text" id="deadline-input" placeholder="Select date" value="' + escapeHTML(deadline) + '" readonly />' +
                '<button type="button" class="date-clear-btn' + (deadline ? ' visible' : '') + '" id="date-clear-btn" title="Clear date"><svg viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M1 1l10 10M11 1L1 11" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg></button>' +
                '<div class="calendar-panel" id="calendar-panel"></div>' +
                '</div>' +
                '</div>' +
                '</div>' +
                '<div class="closed-tag" id="closed-tag">' +
                '<div class="closed-badge">Closed</div>' +
                '<div class="closed-message">Closed requests can\'t be opened via link</div>' +
                '</div>' +
                '</div>' +
                '</div>' +
                '<div class="modal-footer">' +
                footerHTML +
                '</div>' +
                '</div>';

            attachListeners();

            // Tell host to resize container to actual content height (+ buffer to avoid sub-pixel scroll)
            requestAnimationFrame(function() {
                var modal = document.querySelector('.modal');
                if (modal) modal.style.maxHeight = 'none';
                var h = document.getElementById('app-root').scrollHeight;
                if (modal) modal.style.maxHeight = '';
                window.myop_cta_handler('size-requested', { height: h });
            });
        }

        function attachListeners() {
            var closeBtn = document.querySelector('[data-action="close"]');
            if (closeBtn) {
                closeBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                    window.myop_cta_handler('modal-closed');
                });
            }

            // Custom dropdown logic
            var dropdown = document.getElementById('component-dropdown');
            var trigger = document.getElementById('dropdown-trigger');
            var searchInput = document.getElementById('dropdown-search-input');
            var addBtn = document.getElementById('dropdown-add-btn');

            if (trigger) {
                trigger.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                    if (this.classList.contains('locked')) return;
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    dropdown.classList.toggle('open');
                    if (dropdown.classList.contains('open') && searchInput) {
                        searchInput.value = '';
                        filterItems('');
                        setTimeout(function() { searchInput.focus(); }, 0);
                    }
                });
            }

            if (searchInput) {
                searchInput.addEventListener('input', function() {
                    filterItems(searchInput.value);
                });
                searchInput.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                });
            }

            function filterItems(query) {
                var items = dropdown.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-item');
                var lower = query.toLowerCase();
                var hasVisibleItems = false;
                for (var i = 0; i < items.length; i++) {
                    var text = items[i].textContent.toLowerCase();
                    if (text.indexOf(lower) !== -1) {
                        items[i].classList.remove('hidden');
                        hasVisibleItems = true;
                    } else {
                        items[i].classList.add('hidden');
                    }
                }
                var emptyMsg = dropdown.querySelector('.dropdown-empty');
                if (emptyMsg) {
                    emptyMsg.style.display = hasVisibleItems ? 'none' : 'flex';
                }
            }

            function getFormData() {
                var triggerEl = document.getElementById('dropdown-trigger');
                var descEl = document.getElementById('description-input');
                var emailInput = document.getElementById('email-input');
                var deadlineEl = document.getElementById('deadline-input');
                return {
                    componentId: triggerEl ? triggerEl.dataset.selectedId : '',
                    description: descEl ? getPlainText(descEl) : '',
                    contactEmail: emailInput ? emailInput.value : '',
                    deadline: deadlineEl ? deadlineEl.value : ''
                };
            }

            // Dirty state tracking
            var initialFormData = getFormData();
            var wasDirty = false;

            function checkDirty() {
                var fd = getFormData();
                var isDirty = fd.description.trim() !== initialFormData.description.trim()
                    || fd.contactEmail.trim() !== initialFormData.contactEmail.trim()
                    || fd.deadline !== initialFormData.deadline
                    || fd.componentId !== initialFormData.componentId;
                if (isDirty !== wasDirty) {
                    wasDirty = isDirty;
                    window.myop_cta_handler('form-dirty', { isDirty: isDirty });
                }
            }

            function updateSubmitState() {
                var submitBtn = document.querySelector('[data-action="submit"]');
                var saveBtn = document.querySelector('[data-action="save"]');
                var fd = getFormData();
                // In edit mode the dropdown is locked, so componentId may not update — don't require it
                var isEditMode = !!saveBtn;
                var isValid = isEditMode
                    ? !!(fd.description.trim() && fd.contactEmail.trim())
                    : !!(fd.componentId && fd.description.trim() && fd.contactEmail.trim());
                if (submitBtn) submitBtn.disabled = !isValid;
                if (saveBtn) {
                    if (isValid) {
                        saveBtn.classList.remove('disabled');
                    } else {
                        saveBtn.classList.add('disabled');
                    }
                }
                checkDirty();
            }

            var dropdownList = dropdown ? dropdown.querySelector('.dropdown-list') : null;
            if (dropdownList) {
                dropdownList.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                    var item = e.target.closest('.dropdown-item');
                    if (!item) return;
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    var prev = dropdownList.querySelector('.dropdown-item.selected');
                    if (prev) prev.classList.remove('selected');
                    item.classList.add('selected');
                    trigger.querySelector('span').textContent = item.textContent;
                    trigger.dataset.selectedId = item.dataset.id;
                    trigger.classList.add('has-value');
                    dropdown.classList.remove('open');
                    updateSubmitState();
                });
            }

            var descriptionInput = document.getElementById('description-input');
            var colorPicker = document.getElementById('hidden-color-picker');
            var emailInput = document.getElementById('email-input');
            var isRendering = false;
            var activeColorTarget = null;

            function reRenderDescription() {
                if (!descriptionInput || isRendering) return;
                isRendering = true;
                var caretOffset = getCaretOffset(descriptionInput);
                var plain = getPlainText(descriptionInput);
                descriptionInput.innerHTML = renderColorTokens(plain);
                restoreCaretOffset(descriptionInput, caretOffset);
                isRendering = false;
                updateSubmitState();
            }

            if (descriptionInput) {
                descriptionInput.addEventListener('input', function() {
                    if (isRendering) return;
                    reRenderDescription();
                });

                // Swatch or keyword click → open color picker
                descriptionInput.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                    var swatch = e.target.closest('.color-swatch-token');
                    var keyword = e.target.closest('.color-keyword-token');
                    var token = swatch || keyword;
                    if (token && colorPicker) {
                        activeColorTarget = token.dataset.color;
                        // Position picker near the token
                        var rect = token.getBoundingClientRect();
                        var containerRect = document.getElementById('rich-textarea-container').getBoundingClientRect();
                        colorPicker.style.left = (rect.left - containerRect.left) + 'px';
                        colorPicker.style.top = (rect.bottom - containerRect.top) + 'px';
                        colorPicker.style.pointerEvents = 'auto';
                        // Pre-set picker to current color if hex
                        if (/^#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,6}$/.test(activeColorTarget)) {
                            colorPicker.value = activeColorTarget;
                        }
                        colorPicker.click();
                    }
                });
            }

            if (colorPicker) {
                colorPicker.addEventListener('input', function() {
                    if (!activeColorTarget || !descriptionInput) return;
                    var newColor = colorPicker.value;
                    var plain = getPlainText(descriptionInput);
                    // Replace old color value with new hex
                    plain = plain.split(activeColorTarget).join(newColor);
                    descriptionInput.innerHTML = renderColorTokens(plain);
                    activeColorTarget = newColor;
                    updateSubmitState();
                });
                colorPicker.addEventListener('change', function() {
                    colorPicker.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
                    activeColorTarget = null;
                });
            }

            if (emailInput) emailInput.addEventListener('input', updateSubmitState);

            updateSubmitState();

            if (addBtn) {
                addBtn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    dropdown.classList.remove('open');
                    window.myop_cta_handler('add-component-clicked');
                });
            }

            document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                if (dropdown && !dropdown.contains(e.target)) {
                    dropdown.classList.remove('open');
                }
            });

            // Date picker logic
            var datePickerWrapper = document.getElementById('date-picker-wrapper');
            var deadlineInput = document.getElementById('deadline-input');
            var calendarPanel = document.getElementById('calendar-panel');

            var currentCalendarMonth = new Date();
            var selectedDate = null;

            function formatDate(date) {
                var day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
                var month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
                var year = date.getFullYear();
                return day + '/' + month + '/' + year;
            }

            function parseDate(dateString) {
                if (!dateString) return null;
                var parts = dateString.split('/');
                if (parts.length === 3) {
                    return new Date(parseInt(parts[2]), parseInt(parts[1]) - 1, parseInt(parts[0]));
                }
                return null;
            }

            function renderCalendar() {
                var year = currentCalendarMonth.getFullYear();
                var month = currentCalendarMonth.getMonth();
                var today = new Date();

                var firstDay = new Date(year, month, 1);
                var startDate = new Date(firstDay);
                startDate.setDate(startDate.getDate() - firstDay.getDay());

                var months = ['January', 'February', 'March', 'April', 'May', 'June',
                              'July', 'August', 'September', 'October', 'November', 'December'];

                var html = '<div class="calendar-header">' +
                    '<button type="button" class="calendar-nav-btn" data-direction="prev">\u2039</button>' +
                    '<div class="calendar-month-year">' + months[month] + ' ' + year + '</div>' +
                    '<button type="button" class="calendar-nav-btn" data-direction="next">\u203A</button>' +
                    '</div>' +
                    '<div class="calendar-weekdays">' +
                        '<div class="calendar-weekday">Sun</div>' +
                        '<div class="calendar-weekday">Mon</div>' +
                        '<div class="calendar-weekday">Tue</div>' +
                        '<div class="calendar-weekday">Wed</div>' +
                        '<div class="calendar-weekday">Thu</div>' +
                        '<div class="calendar-weekday">Fri</div>' +
                        '<div class="calendar-weekday">Sat</div>' +
                    '</div>' +
                    '<div class="calendar-days">';

                for (var i = 0; i < 42; i++) {
                    var date = new Date(startDate);
                    date.setDate(date.getDate() + i);
                    var isCurrentMonth = date.getMonth() === month;
                    var isToday = date.getFullYear() === today.getFullYear() &&
                                  date.getMonth() === today.getMonth() &&
                                  date.getDate() === today.getDate();
                    var isSelected = selectedDate && formatDate(date) === selectedDate;
                    var classes = 'calendar-day';
                    if (!isCurrentMonth) classes += ' other-month';
                    if (isToday) classes += ' today';
                    if (isSelected) classes += ' selected';

                    html += '<button type="button" class="' + classes + '" data-date="' + formatDate(date) + '">' + date.getDate() + '</button>';
                }

                html += '</div>';
                calendarPanel.innerHTML = html;

                var navBtns = calendarPanel.querySelectorAll('.calendar-nav-btn');
                for (var n = 0; n < navBtns.length; n++) {
                    navBtns[n].addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        var direction = this.getAttribute('data-direction');
                        if (direction === 'prev') {
                            currentCalendarMonth.setMonth(currentCalendarMonth.getMonth() - 1);
                        } else {
                            currentCalendarMonth.setMonth(currentCalendarMonth.getMonth() + 1);
                        }
                        renderCalendar();
                    });
                }

                var dayButtons = calendarPanel.querySelectorAll('.calendar-day');
                for (var j = 0; j < dayButtons.length; j++) {
                    dayButtons[j].addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        if (this.classList.contains('other-month')) return;
                        selectedDate = this.getAttribute('data-date');
                        deadlineInput.value = selectedDate;
                        calendarPanel.classList.remove('open');
                        renderCalendar();
                        updateClearBtn();
                        updateSubmitState();
                    });
                }
            }

            var dateClearBtn = document.getElementById('date-clear-btn');

            function updateClearBtn() {
                if (dateClearBtn) {
                    if (deadlineInput && deadlineInput.value) {
                        dateClearBtn.classList.add('visible');
                    } else {
                        dateClearBtn.classList.remove('visible');
                    }
                }
            }

            if (dateClearBtn) {
                dateClearBtn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    selectedDate = null;
                    if (deadlineInput) deadlineInput.value = '';
                    calendarPanel.classList.remove('open');
                    updateClearBtn();
                    updateSubmitState();
                });
            }

            if (deadlineInput) {
                deadlineInput.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    calendarPanel.classList.toggle('open');
                    if (calendarPanel.classList.contains('open')) {
                        selectedDate = parseDate(deadlineInput.value) ? deadlineInput.value : null;
                        currentCalendarMonth = new Date();
                        if (selectedDate) {
                            var parsed = parseDate(selectedDate);
                            currentCalendarMonth = new Date(parsed.getFullYear(), parsed.getMonth(), 1);
                        }
                        renderCalendar();
                    }
                });
            }

            document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                if (datePickerWrapper && !datePickerWrapper.contains(e.target)) {
                    calendarPanel.classList.remove('open');
                }
            });

            // Submit button
            var submitBtn = document.querySelector('[data-action="submit"]');
            if (submitBtn) {
                submitBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                    var fd = getFormData();
                    window.myop_cta_handler('submit-clicked', fd);
                });
            }

            // Save button
            var saveBtn = document.querySelector('[data-action="save"]');
            if (saveBtn) {
                saveBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                    var btn = this;
                    if (btn.classList.contains('disabled')) return;
                    var fd = getFormData();
                    window.myop_cta_handler('submit-clicked', fd);
                });
            }

            // Copy link button
            var copyLinkBtn = document.querySelector('[data-action="copy-link"]');
            if (copyLinkBtn) {
                var copyLinkOriginalHTML = copyLinkBtn.innerHTML;
                copyLinkBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                    var btn = this;
                    if (btn.classList.contains('disabled')) return;
                    window.myop_cta_handler('copy-link-clicked');
                    btn.classList.add('clicked');
                    btn.innerHTML = '✓ Copied';
                    setTimeout(function() {
                        btn.classList.remove('clicked');
                        btn.innerHTML = copyLinkOriginalHTML;
                    }, 2000);
                });
            }

            // Close request button
            var isRequestClosed = false;
            var closeRequestBtn = document.querySelector('[data-action="close-request"]');
            if (closeRequestBtn) {
                var closeRequestBtn_ref = closeRequestBtn;
                closeRequestBtn_ref.addEventListener('click', function() {
                    isRequestClosed = !isRequestClosed;
                    var closedTag = document.getElementById('closed-tag');
                    var copyBtn = document.querySelector('[data-action="copy-link"]');
                    if (isRequestClosed) {
                        if (closedTag) closedTag.classList.add('visible');
                        if (copyBtn) copyBtn.classList.add('disabled');
                        closeRequestBtn_ref.innerHTML = SVG_REOPEN_REQUEST + 'Reopen request';
                    } else {
                        if (closedTag) closedTag.classList.remove('visible');
                        if (copyBtn) copyBtn.classList.remove('disabled');
                        var closeLabel = closeRequestBtn_ref.getAttribute('data-original-label') || 'Close request';
                        closeRequestBtn_ref.innerHTML = SVG_CLOSE_REQUEST + closeLabel;
                    }
                    window.myop_cta_handler('close-request-clicked', { closed: isRequestClosed });
                });
                // Store original label
                var origText = closeRequestBtn.textContent.trim();
                closeRequestBtn.setAttribute('data-original-label', origText);
            }
        }

        function escapeHTML(str) {
            if (!str) return '';
            return String(str)
                .replace(/&/g, '&')
                .replace(/</g, '<')
                .replace(/>/g, '>')
                .replace(/"/g, '"');
        }

        window.myop_init_interface = function(data) {
            if (!data) return currentData;
            currentData = data;
            render(data);
        };

        window.myop_cta_handler = function(action_id, payload) {
            // Will be overridden by host application
        };
    })();
</script>

<script id="myop_preview">
    window.myop_init_interface({
        title: "Share request via link",
        subtitle: "Before sharing, add relevant information about your request",
        components: [
            { id: "comp-1", name: "Component 1" },
            { id: "comp-2", name: "Component 2" },
            { id: "comp-3", name: "Component 3" },
            { id: "comp-4", name: "Component 4" },
            { id: "comp-5", name: "Component 5" },
            { id: "comp-6", name: "Component 6" },
            { id: "comp-7", name: "Component 7" },
            { id: "comp-8", name: "Component 8" }
        ],
        selectedComponentId: "",
        description: "",
        contactEmail: "",
        deadline: "",
        iconUrl: "",
        submitLabel: "Save & generate link"
    });
</script>
</body>
</html>
